zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Sneyd於1486年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir William Sneyd22歲，母親Lady Susanna Ledsham22歲。他於1513年與Lady Anne Fouleshurst在英國爾布拉德瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年2月14日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾凱勒享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Sneyd于1486年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir William Sneyd22岁，母亲Lady Susanna Ledsham22岁。他于1513年与Lady Anne Fouleshurst在英国爾布拉德瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年2月14日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾凱勒享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sneyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sneyd in Burslem (Staffordshire), The Sneyd near Bloxwich (also Staffordshire), or Snead Farm and Snead Common in Rock (Worcestershire), all of which derived from Middle English snede, Old English snǣd ‘detached piece of land or woodland’. Compare Snaith .

variants.name: Snaith
meanings: English: habitational name from Snaith in Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old Norse sneith ‘slice of land, piece of land cut off’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Sneyd was born in 1486, in England, his father, Sir William Sneyd, was 22 and his mother, Lady Susanna Ledsham, was 22. He married Lady Anne Fouleshurst in 1513, in Bradwall, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 February 1538, in Keele, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Sneyd est né en 1486, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Sneyd, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Susanna Ledsham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Fouleshurst en 1513, à Bradwall, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1538, à Keele, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Sneyd 1486 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Sneyd 22 und seine Mutter Lady Susanna Ledsham 22. Er hat 1513 in Bradwall, Cheshire, England Lady Anne Fouleshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1538 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Keele, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sneyd è nato il nel 1486 nel England, il suo padre, Sir William Sneyd, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lady Susanna Ledsham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Fouleshurst nel 1513, nel Bradwall, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1538, nel Keele, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Sneydが1486年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Sneydは22歳，母Lady Susanna Ledshamは22歳であった。1513年にイギリスチェシュアイアブラドワルでLady Anne Fouleshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年2月14日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアケエルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Sneyd(이)가 1486년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Sneyd(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Susanna Ledsham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1513년 영국 체실르 브라드월에서 Lady Anne Fouleshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 케일에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sneyd nasceu em 1486, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Sneyd, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Susanna Ledsham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Fouleshurst em 1513, em Bradwall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1538, em Keele, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Sneyd родился в 1486 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Sneyd было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Susanna Ledsham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Fouleshurst в 1513 г. в местности брадвалл, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1538 г. в местности киль, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Sneyd nació en 1486, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Sneyd, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Susanna Ledsham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Fouleshurst en 1513, en Bradwall, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1538, en Keele, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
